title: Ten Years Later: The Pied Piper Documentary
description: Once a 2010s tech darling, Pied Piper ultimately crashed and burned with their doomed launch of PiperNet. Ten years later, we follow up with founder Richard Hendricks.
quote: You don’t feel bad that you never got to make the world a better place?
altHero: Pied Piper winning at Tech Crunch Disrupt SF
alt2: Richard Hendricks holding up a Pied Piper mouse pad
alt3: Erlich Bachman obscured by curtain and shadow
